summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Gleam LED website completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working as expected. Contact form integration with MongoDB verified.
passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Home page loads with hero section, features, products, and use cases
Navigation bar with logo and menu items functional
Products page with category tabs (All, Transparent, Indoor, Outdoor)
Product detail pages with specifications and features
Contact form submission successfully saves to MongoDB
About Us, Use Cases, and Portfolio pages load correctly
Mobile responsiveness with working mobile menu
Footer with proper links and contact information
Professional design with proper Manrope font and color scheme
High-quality LED display images and technical specifications
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
